Who is the referee and what is the officiating profile for this match?

summary.en: KTP vs PK-35: contextual analysis using historical and available data. KTP: 3-1-1 across the last 5. PK-35: 4-1-0 across the last 5. Recent form gives a slight edge to the away side.
